name: k6-debug
description: Debug k6 load testing scripts — instrument, run, and attach in one step

k6debug.binaryPath.markdownDescription:
Path to a k6 binary that has the xk6-debug extension built in. Leave empty to use the bundled binary.

Set this in **workspace settings** (`.vscode/settings.json`) to use a project-specific binary — useful when you have a custom k6 build that combines xk6-debug with other extensions:

```json
{ "k6debug.binaryPath": "./bin/my-custom-k6" }
```

program.description: Path to the k6 script to debug (will be instrumented automatically).

k6Args.description: Extra arguments passed to k6 run (e.g. ["--vus", "2"]).

port.description: Port of a running k6 DAP server.

configurationSnippets.label: k6 Debug: Launch
configurationSnippets.description: Instrument and debug a k6 script

configurationSnippets.label: k6 Debug: Attach
configurationSnippets.description: Attach to an already-running k6 DAP server
